title: CT12 legal branch run — Peeling loop
description: Concrete schema for one legal execution branch of CT12 (Peeling loop). A conforming run may use only CT12 node IDs and records, must start at an entry node, follow declared transitions with repetition only on declared loops, align every proof record with its visited node ID, and finish with a matching outcome.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for a branch execution of CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12".

visitedNodeIds.description: Required execution-order path for one actual CT12 (Peeling loop) branch. Every item must be a concrete ID from CT12.N01 through CT12.N16; the first must be an entry node, adjacent IDs must follow a declared CT12 transition, and repeats are allowed only on a declared loop.

nodeRecords.description: Required discharge records aligned position-for-position with visitedNodeIds for this CT12 run. The array must have the same length as visitedNodeIds; every item must match one concrete CT12 node-record schema and its nodeId must equal the corresponding visited ID.

x-semanticValidationRules: validate visitedNodeIds as a path in the corresponding tactic transition graph
